goal.description: You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 09:00 and should go to london kings cross. The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge. Make sure you get train ID

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for a train to go to London Kings Cross.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are several available option to travel to Kings cross today. What time would you like to travel?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need to travel after 9am

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 56 trains. How does the TR2000 train that leaves at 9 am sound?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: that will be ok. thank you for your help

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Can I look up anything else for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That's on Wednesday, right?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No, that's on Friday, actually. On Wednesday, I have TR6583 departing Cambridge at 9:00, going to London King's Cross. Will that work for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay very good. What's the train ID on that please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: TR6583, would you like for me to get you tickets?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes please book that train for me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, will you be traveling alone?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes it's just going to be me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I've booked you a ticket. The fee is 23.6 GBP, payable at the station. The reference number is 3XI4V3C1. Is there anything else I can assist with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, that's all. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: thanks for your service

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Have a nice day.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Have a great day. Let me know if you need any other help.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I will. Thanks again!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome. Please call us again if you need anything else.
